commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 08 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with the tightest metrics across all dimensions: ILLIQ of 0.0014 and roll spread of 1.07%. Nasdaq 100 follows closely as the second-most liquid venue. London Stock Exchange significantly lags the top performers, displaying substantially higher illiquidity (0.1446) and the widest AR spread (0.8515%), suggesting notably higher transaction costs for investors. The transatlantic liquidity gap underscores ongoing market structure disparities between major financial centers.
